description: 反规则，最另类。撕纸碎片+混搭字体+胶带+有序的混乱。
base_style_prompt: Dada collage style. Paper white (#F5F5F5), ink black (#000000), brand red (#FF0000), tape yellow (#FFEAA7), random colors. Torn paper fragments. Mixed fonts and angles. Tape and pins. Rubber stamp data. Ordered chaos. Anti-design aesthetic that rules through rule-breaking.
